description_long: This is a small wooden cabin with a gable roof constructed from wide, horizontal wooden planks. The front facade features two rectangular windows with white panes, flanked by thick, rounded wooden columns, and a stone foundation that wraps around the base. A small porch with a wooden deck and metal railing extends from one side, accessible by a short set of stairs. The rear of the cabin is solid wood with no windows or doors, while the opposite side mirrors the front but without the porch. The roof is steeply pitched and overhangs the walls, providing some shelter to the entryway and porch. The overall appearance is rustic, with natural wood textures and a sturdy, compact form.
description: A rustic wooden cabin with a gable roof, stone foundation, front windows, and a side porch with metal railing. The structure features natural wood textures and a compact, sturdy design.
description_view_0: Front view showing two rectangular windows, thick wooden columns, and the stone foundation.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the open porch with metal railing and the main entrance, with the gable roof overhead.
description_view_2: Opposite front view, similar to view 0 but with the porch visible on the left side.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a solid wooden wall with no windows or doors, and the stone foundation.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with a steep pitch and wide overhangs, constructed from wooden planks
attribute_window_arrangement: Two medium-sized rectangular windows symmetrically placed on the front facade, with no windows visible on the sides or rear
attribute_door_placement: Single main door located on the side with the porch, adjacent to the front facade
